arts.ttl: Trinity Rodman is back with the US soccer team for a pair of games against Brazil
arts.sum: Rodman was part of the U.S. team’s “Triple Espresso” front line with Mallory Swanson and Sophia Wilson that helped lead the team to its fifth Olympic gold medal in Paris. She made her return to her club team, the Washington Spirit, last weekend in an National Women’s Soccer League match.
